name: Spirit Airlines

carryOn.notes: Carry-on bag requires a fee unless purchased with a bundle. Personal item included free.

economy.notes: $31–$55+ per bag depending on when purchased.

business.notes: N/A - Spirit does not offer business class.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: Does Spirit charge for carry-on bags?
faqs.answer: Yes, Spirit charges for carry-on bags (overhead bin). Personal items that fit under the seat are included free. Fees range from $31–$55+ depending on when you purchase.

faqs.question: How much does Spirit charge for checked bags?
faqs.answer: Checked bag fees start at $31 if purchased during booking and can increase to $55+ at the gate. Weight limit is 40 lbs.
